evals.name: full-4-transcripts-embodied-ai
evals.prompt: 我上传了4个晚点聊播客的逐字稿，分别是至简动力贾鹏、千寻智能韩峰涛、元力灵机范浩强+千寻高阳、踏石/它石陈亦伦的访谈。请帮我把这4个访谈整合成一份行业分析报告，我主要想搞清楚：中国具身智能行业现在到底处于什么阶段，以及不同创始人对行业核心挑战的判断有什么分歧。
files: /sessions/friendly-jolly-ritchie/mnt/uploads/具身智能创业访谈 - 逐字稿合集.docx
evals.expected_output: A structured .docx report with: core question identified, S-curve positioning, at least 2 charts, clear tensions between interviewees surfaced, sources labeled as 访谈 vs third-party, no fabricated data in signals section

assertions.text: Report was saved as a .docx file
Report clearly states a single core question it is trying to answer, not just summarizing each person
Report explicitly identifies at least one point of disagreement between interviewees (e.g. hardware vs model priority)
Report distinguishes between 访谈 (interview) sources and third-party data sources with explicit labels
Report contains at least 2 embedded charts/figures
Observation signals in conclusion are labeled as 访谈推断 or have cited sources, not presented as facts without basis

evals.name: 2-transcripts-strategic-angle
evals.prompt: 这里有2个访谈逐字稿：千寻智能韩峰涛和踏石陈亦伦。他们都从自动驾驶背景转型来做具身智能，但路径不一样。帮我分析一下，从这两个人的对比里，能看出什么关于'如何从自动驾驶经验迁移到具身智能'的洞见？如果我是一个正在考虑进入这个赛道的人，这两条路各自的优劣是什么？
files: /sessions/friendly-jolly-ritchie/mnt/uploads/具身智能创业访谈 - 逐字稿合集.docx
evals.expected_output: A focused report comparing two paths from autonomous driving to embodied AI, with concrete strategic pros/cons for each, structured around the comparison rather than sequential summaries

assertions.text: Report was saved as a .docx file
Report organizes content by theme/dimension of comparison, not just 'Person A thinks X, then Person B thinks Y' sequentially
Report includes concrete strategic implications for someone entering the field, not just description of what the two founders did
Report includes at least 2 direct quotes from the transcripts to anchor key claims

evals.name: implicit-synthesis-request
evals.prompt: 帮我看看这些具身智能的访谈，感觉最近这个赛道很热但我不太懂，搞清楚一下
files: /sessions/friendly-jolly-ritchie/mnt/uploads/具身智能创业访谈 - 逐字稿合集.docx
evals.expected_output: Despite vague prompt, skill should still produce a structured report with a clear framing, not just a bullet-point summary. Should identify a core question to answer on the user's behalf.

assertions.text: Report was saved as a .docx file
Report explicitly states what question it chose to answer on behalf of the vague user prompt
Report explains domain-specific terms and is accessible to a non-expert reader, not just jargon-heavy
Report has an opinion or synthesis beyond listing what each person said

evals.name: audio-links-transcribe-then-synthesize
evals.prompt:
我有两期小宇宙播客的链接，都是关于具身智能的创业访谈。请先把它们转录成逐字稿，再帮我综合分析：这两位创始人对行业现状的判断有什么共识和分歧？

https://www.xiaoyuzhou.fm/episode/PLACEHOLDER_URL_1
https://www.xiaoyuzhou.fm/episode/PLACEHOLDER_URL_2

千问 API Key: sk-PLACEHOLDER_KEY
evals.notes: This eval requires real 小宇宙 URLs and a valid API key. Replace PLACEHOLDER values before running. Tests the full two-step pipeline: transcription → synthesis.
evals.expected_output: Two .txt transcript files saved as deliverables, plus one .docx synthesis report. Transcripts should have episode metadata headers. Report should not be run until both transcripts are complete.

assertions.text: At least 2 .txt transcript files were saved, one per episode URL
Each .txt file starts with episode title, podcast name, source URL, and transcription model
A synthesis report was saved as a .docx file
The .docx report references content from the transcripts (not hallucinated), with at least 2 direct quotes
The .txt transcripts are shown to the user as standalone deliverables, not just silently used as intermediate files

evals.name: mixed-input-url-plus-file
evals.prompt:
我有一个小宇宙链接和一个已经整理好的逐字稿文件，都是具身智能相关的。帮我把这两个访谈综合分析，看看他们对'数据稀缺性'这个问题的看法有什么异同。

链接：https://www.xiaoyuzhou.fm/episode/PLACEHOLDER_URL

（逐字稿文件已上传）
files: /sessions/friendly-jolly-ritchie/mnt/uploads/具身智能创业访谈 - 逐字稿合集.docx
evals.notes: Tests mixed-mode: one audio URL (needs transcription) + one existing transcript file. Replace PLACEHOLDER URL before running.
evals.expected_output: Skill handles both inputs gracefully: transcribes the URL first, then uses both the new transcript and the uploaded file for synthesis.

assertions.text: A .txt transcript was generated from the URL input
The synthesis report references content from both the URL-sourced transcript and the uploaded file
A .docx synthesis report was produced
